meaning: n.副题(书本中的),说明对白的字幕
examples: "Kathleen" was, as its 1892 subtitle asserted, "An Irish Drama."
The subtitle was How Sugar is Killing Us.
But it is less clear, to take the question of his subtitle, Why We Should Like, Care.
That certainly covers a lot of issues that people grapple with, just in the subtitle!
In addition, the Amara subtitle interface is simple enough for amateur volunteers to use.
